zh.Enville, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾恩維爾
zh.Wooten, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Grey於1510年出生在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾時，他的父親Sir Edward Grey38歲，母親Anne Harewell Middleton36歲。他於1533年與Anne Verney在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年12月31日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾。

zh-hans.Enville, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾恩維爾
zh-hans.Wooten, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Grey于1510年出生在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾时，他的父亲Sir Edward Grey38岁，母亲Anne Harewell Middleton36岁。他于1533年与Anne Verney在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年12月31日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Grey was born in 1510, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Edward Grey, was 38 and his mother, Anne Harewell Middleton, was 36. He married Anne Verney in 1533, in Enville, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 31 December 1559, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Enville, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Grey est né en 1510, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Grey, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anne Harewell Middleton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Anne Verney en 1533, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1559, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Grey 1510 in Enville, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Grey 38 und seine Mutter Anne Harewell Middleton 36. Er hat 1533 in Enville, Staffordshire, England Anne Verney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1559 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Enville, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Grey è nato il nel 1510 nel Enville, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Grey, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Anne Harewell Middleton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Anne Verney nel 1533, nel Enville, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1559, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Enville, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Greyが1510年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Greyは38歳，母Anne Harewell Middletonは36歳であった。1533年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルでAnne Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年12月31日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Grey(이)가 1510년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Grey(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Harewell Middleton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1533년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 Anne Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 12월 31일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에 묻혔다.

mn.Enville, Staffordshire, England: Enville, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Grey nasceu em 1510, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Grey, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anne Harewell Middleton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Verney em 1533, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1559, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Grey родился в 1510 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Grey было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Harewell Middleton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Verney в 1533 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 31 декабря 1559 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Grey nació en 1510, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Grey, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Anne Harewell Middleton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Anne Verney en 1533, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1559, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
